title: Luxaviation Joins Project SkyPower to Drive AviationГўв‚¬в„ўs Transition to Electro-Sustainable Fuel
content: Luxaviation Group, one of the worldГўв‚¬в„ўs largest business aircraft and helicopter operators, headquartered in Luxembourg, has joined Project SkyPower, in March 2025, an international CEO-led initiative dedicated to accelerating the development and adoption of electro-sustainable aviation fuel (e-SAF). This strategic milestone reinforces LuxaviationГўв‚¬в„ўs long-standing commitment to fostering a more sustainable future for aviation. LuxaviationГўв‚¬в„ўs participation as an active member of Project SkyPower provides the Group with an opportunity to engage in strategic discussions that will help shape the regulatory and industrial framework of electro-sustainable fuels.
author: Analysts Account
